name: campus-trade-link
description: A social network app for university students

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:web && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:shared
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules web/node_modules mobile/node_modules shared/node_modules
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run install:all

author: Campus Trade Link Team
